channel.title: VerifyAI Daily Scam Report
channel.description: Daily notes on romance scams, stolen photos, and fake profile patterns.

item.title: Elderly Man Nearly Loses NT$200K to Online Romance Scam, Shilin Police Intervene to Save His Savings
item.description: Mr. Chen, 70, met someone claiming to be 'Sakurako' from Japan on social media, fell into an online romance investment scam that nearly cost him NT$200,000. Shilin police intervened in time to save his life savings.

item.title: The 'Wrong Number' Trap: Bay Area Man Loses $1 Million in Pig Butchering Scam
item.description: A cautionary tale of how a simple text message led to a devastating crypto investment loss through a sophisticated romance scam.
